name: Pastry Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475°F.
2. Mix together all of the ingredients in a bowl.
3. Stir with a fork until thoroughly mixed. Do not overwork the dough.
4. Shape the mixture into a ball and place it between two pieces of parchment paper that have been dusted with flour.
5. Roll the pastry into a circle large enough to fit in a 9-inch pie pan.
6. Spray the pan with non-fat cooking spray.
7. Arrange the crust in the pan.
8. Cut off edges that hang over.
9. Prick the bottom of the crust with a fork.
10. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown. Cool before adding filling.
11. If making a pie where the filling needs to be cooked with the shell, simply bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or however long the recipe calls for.
12. Work foil over the edges while baking so the crust won't get overbrown. Remove foil for the last five minutes.
YIELD: 1 pie crust (8 servings)
PER SERVING: Fat: 0.12 g, Calories: 52, protein: 2g, Cholesterol: 0mg, 2% of calories from fat
